decks.notes: This Orzhov Aggro deck focuses on aggressive creatures with low mana costs to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes cards that disrupt the opponent's strategy, such as Accursed Marauder and Bojuka Bog. Ephemerate and Oroku Saki, Shredder Rising provide extra value by reusing powerful creatures or removing threats from the opponent. The inclusion of Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher allow for additional card advantage and flexibility in combat. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and maintain control of the board to secure a victory.

The deck focuses on quickly getting Balustrade Spy onto the battlefield to mill the entire deck and put creatures into the graveyard. This is done by utilizing cards such as Overgrown Battlement, Wall of Roots, and Gatecreeper Vine to generate mana and cards like Winding Way and Lead the Stampede to dig deeper into the deck. Once the deck is milled, Dread Return can be used to bring back Lotleth Giant or Troll of Khazad-dûm for a massive amount of damage to finish off the opponent.

The primary focus of this deck is to quickly swarm the board with inexpensive artifact creatures and use them to deal damage to the opponent. By utilizing cards like Myr Enforcer and Galvanic Blast, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy. Additionally, the deck includes various artifacts and spells to support the aggro strategy, such as Ichor Wellspring for card draw and Toxin Analysis for removal. Overall, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and close out the game quickly with its aggressive creatures and spells.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using spells like Counterspell and Dispel to disrupt opponents, while also generating value through creatures like Augur of Bolas and Mulldrifter. The deck aims to outvalue opponents by recurring key spells with Archaeomancer and Ephemerate, and generating tokens with Murmuring Mystic. Skred and Lightning Bolt provide removal options, while card draw and selection is provided by Brainstorm and Preordain. The deck also includes various utility spells like Thraben Charm and Destroy Evil to deal with specific threats, and a few combat tricks like Union of the Third Path and Fanged Flames to surprise opponents.

Utilizing a mix of card draw, cheap interaction, and value creatures, this deck aims to control the board while generating card advantage and staying ahead in resources. By recurring key spells like Ephemerate and Ghostly Flicker with Archaeomancer and Mulldrifter, the deck can outvalue opponents while keeping their threats at bay. The deck also looks to gain incremental life with God-Pharaoh's Faithful and Sunscape Familiar to outlast aggressive decks, all while efficiently progressing towards a win condition through card advantage and tempo.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's resources while building a strong board presence with low-cost creatures and sacrificing effects. It aims to apply constant pressure with aggro tactics, using various removal spells to control the opponent's creatures and generate value through sacrificing artifacts and lands. The deck also includes card draw and mana ramp elements to maintain consistency and keep up the pressure on the opponent. Ultimately, the strategy revolves around overwhelming the opponent with an aggressive game plan and resource denial.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying low-cost creatures and controlling the board with counterspells and disruptive spells. By combining efficient creatures like Delver of Secrets and Cryptic Serpent with cheap removal and counterspells, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while disrupting their game plan. The inclusion of card draw spells like Consider and Thought Scour helps maintain card advantage, while Sleep of the Dead and Deem Inferior provide additional ways to control the board and close out the game.

The main idea of this deck is to flood the battlefield with a low-cost, aggressive creatures, and then enhance them with auras and enchantments to make them stronger and harder to deal with. The deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence and attacking the opponent relentlessly to win the game before they can establish a defense. By combining efficient creatures with powerful auras and combat tricks, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy.

The main concept of this Pauper 1 vs 1 Control - Ephemerate deck is to utilize cheap spells and creatures to control the board and generate card advantage. By using cards like God-Pharaoh's Faithful to gain life, Sunscape Familiar to reduce costs, and Sea Gate Oracle to draw cards, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent. Using Ephemerate to blink key creatures and spells for additional value, along with counterspells like Prohibit and card draw like Ponder and Preordain, the deck maintains control of the game until it can close out with powerful finishers like Mulldrifter and Murmuring Mystic.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming your opponent with aggressive creatures and removal spells. It aims to control the board with cards like Krark-Clan Shaman and Cast Down while steadily building a board presence with cards like Nyxborn Hydra and Refurbished Familiar. The deck also includes ways to disrupt your opponent's strategy with cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Blood Fountain. By combining aggression with disruption, this deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver your opponent to secure a fast victory.

The main idea of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to quickly build up a board of creatures that can sacrifice each other to pump up key cards like Mortician Beetle and Bloodthrone Vampire. The deck leverages cards like Carrion Feeder and Village Rites to maintain card advantage while applying pressure to the opponent. With a low mana curve and efficient creatures, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of threats and efficient creature interactions.

This mono blue aggro deck focuses on playing low-cost, evasive creatures like Delver of Secrets and Cryptic Serpent to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive spells like Counterspell and Force Spike to control the game and protect its threats. Card draw spells like Thought Scour and Brainstorm help find the necessary cards to maintain momentum. Boomerang and Sleep of the Dead provide additional ways to disrupt the opponent's board state. The goal is to efficiently pressure the opponent and secure victory through efficient use of resources and tempo advantage.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells in order to deal damage as fast as possible. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Goblin Bushwhacker and Burning-Tree Emissary, along with efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast, the deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and pump effects, the deck can quickly close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to stall and control the game using Fog effects and counterspells while drawing cards and manipulating the library with cards like Brainstorm, Accumulated Knowledge, and Stream of Thought. The ultimate goal is to win through a combo utilizing Jace's Erasure to mill the opponent's deck. The deck also has an alternate win condition with Lórien Revealed, which can deal damage to the opponent when they draw cards. This deck aims to outlast the opponent and win through a strategic combination of control and combo cards.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game through ramping up mana with Urza's lands and Expedition Map, while using powerful creatures like Maelstrom Colossus and Ulamog's Crusher to dominate the board. Filigree Familiar and Wretched Gryff provide early defense, while Candy Trail and Pinnacle Kill-Ship can close out games quickly. The deck also includes removal with Scour from Existence and versatile spells like Lembas. Haunted Fengraf offers graveyard recursion, allowing for sustained pressure. Overall, this deck aims to outvalue opponents and overwhelm them with big threats after establishing a strong mana base.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing the Urzatron lands to generate a large amount of mana. This allows the player to play powerful spells and creatures to outvalue their opponent. The deck also includes various toolbox creatures like Ramosian Sergeant and Blightspeaker, along with removal spells like Doom Blade and Go for the Throat to keep the opponent's board in check. The versatility of the deck is further enhanced by cards like Expedition Map and Prophetic Prism, ensuring consistency in drawing key cards while also ramping up towards the late game.
